Bluetooth Low Energy heart rate monitor service and Bluetooth persistent storage management.


## Files
- **[ble_hrm.c](ble_hrm.c.md)**: Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) service implementation for managing HRM data sharing and permissions.
- **[ble_hrm.h](ble_hrm.h.md)**: Header file for managing Bluetooth Low Energy heart rate monitor sharing and connection handling.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage.c](bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth persistent storage, including handling of BLE and BT Classic pairings, local device information, and synchronization with shared PRF storage.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage_v1_impl.h](bluetooth_persistent_storage_v1_impl.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for Bluetooth LE pairing information storage and conversion.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage_v2_impl.h](bluetooth_persistent_storage_v2_impl.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for Bluetooth Low Energy pairing and encryption information storage.
